productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Tan Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this casual oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and a plastic tongue. Upper Leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Perforations on the forefoot, with perforated overlays for style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable PU outsole with a raised and grooved TPR heel for grip, ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
